item.title: First reading, referred to Environment, Energy & Technology.
item.description: First reading, referred to Environment, Energy & Technology.
item.guid: 2026-01-14/First reading, referred to Environment, Energy & Technology.

item.title: 👎💵Jennifer Ziegler - Les Schwab Tire Company
item.description: Jennifer Ziegler signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Les Schwab Tire Company. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎Tracey Norberg - United States Tire Manufacturers Association
item.description: Tracey Norberg signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent United States Tire Manufacturers Association.

item.title: 👎💵Sheri Call - Washington Trucking Associations
item.description: Sheri Call signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Washington Trucking Associations. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓Jenifer McIntyre - WA Aggregate and Concrete Association
item.description: Jenifer McIntyre signed up to testify Other.

item.title: 👎John Worthington - Washington Trucking Associations
item.description: John Worthington signed up to testify Con.

item.title: ❓💵Rose Gundersen - WA Retail Association
item.description: Rose Gundersen signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent WA Retail Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Alexei Calombikidis - Trout Unlimited
item.description: Alexei Calombikidis signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Trout Unlimited.

item.title: 👍Maggie Yuse - Seattle Public Utilities
item.description: Maggie Yuse signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Seattle Public Utilities.

item.title: 👍💵Nick Federici - Toxic Free Future
item.description: Nick Federici signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Toxic Free Future. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Gail Cabahug - Puget Soundkeeper
item.description: Gail Cabahug signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Puget Soundkeeper. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓Kimberly Goetz - Department of Ecology
item.description: Kimberly Goetz signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Department of Ecology.

item.title: 👍💵Heather Trim - Zero Waste Washington
item.description: Heather Trim signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Zero Waste Washington. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓Don Gourlie - Puget Sound Partnership
item.description: Don Gourlie signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Puget Sound Partnership.

item.title: 👎💵Peter Godlewski - Association of Washington Business
item.description: Peter Godlewski signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Business. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Lucas Hall - Long Live the Kings
item.description: Lucas Hall signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Long Live the Kings.

item.title: 👍John Flanagan - Port of Seattle
item.description: John Flanagan signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Port of Seattle.

item.title: 👎💵Michael Transue - WA Aggregate and Concrete Association
item.description: Michael Transue signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent WA Aggregate and Concrete Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: NEWSFLASH: Senate Democrats pass $80 billion budget - a house of cards built on phantom savings - Senate Republican Caucus
item.description: News article "NEWSFLASH: Senate Democrats pass $80 billion budget - a house of cards built on phantom savings - Senate Republican Caucus" from Senate Republicans.
